description:
An intuitive diagram software with templates for any scenario.

EdrawMax is a powerful, all-in-one, and yet easy-to-use diagramming tool that enables users to visualize the ideas effortlessly. With EdrawMax, you can create and customize flowcharts, Venn diagrams, mind maps, organizational charts, Gantt charts, UML diagrams, electrical drawings, genograms, building plans, etc.
Cloud File Enhancements
1. Cloud files can now be renamed directly by double-clicking the file name tab.
2. Added support for setting cloud files as the default for new files.
3. A dedicated entry for Cloud Files has been added to the menu.
Network Diagram Enhancements
1. Rack diagram shapes can now be imported directly and will automatically snap to the rack frame within the software.
2. Support for displaying the symbol name or tooltip directly below the symbol.
3. Image within custom symbol library added to the canvas can now be restricted within a specified size range.
Symbol Library Enhancements
1. Custom symbol libraries now support creating custom groups.
2. Exported symbol libraries can now be encrypted.
AI Image Templates Added to the AI Diagram Home & Community with One-Click Style Replication
1. Added 70+ templates across different diagram types, including floor plans, organizational charts, electrical engineering diagrams, process flow diagrams, biomedical diagrams, posters, and more.
